title: I Asked the Vantage 26 Concierge for Something Impossible. They Did It.
excerpt: I wanted to test the limits of the VIP concierge service. So I asked for something ridiculous — a specific wine from a specific year, delivered to my suite at halftime. What happened next shocked me.
content:
I wanted to see if the VIP concierge was real or just marketing fluff.

So I tested them.

I booked a mid-tier hospitality package for the Brazil group match at SoFi Stadium. Nothing extravagant. Normal VIP.

Then I emailed the concierge with a ridiculous request:

"I want a bottle of Château Margaux 1996 at my seat by halftime."

A 29-year-old bottle of Bordeaux. In Los Angeles. During a World Cup match. At halftime.

I expected them to say no.

## The Response

Four hours later, I got an email back:

"Hello. We've located a bottle at a wine merchant in Beverly Hills. It will be decanted and delivered to your suite before the second half begins. Would you like it served with the cheese course or on its own?"

I stared at the email for a solid minute.

They didn't even ask if I was joking.

## Match Day

I arrived at SoFi. Usual VIP treatment — priority entrance, lounge access, great seat. The match was incredible. Brazil scored in the 32nd minute and the stadium erupted.

Halftime came. I went back to my seat after a quick break.

And there it was.

A bottle of Château Margaux 1996. Decanted. Two glasses. A small card with "Enjoy the second half" written on it.

I didn't ask for the card. I didn't ask for two glasses. They just knew.

## What Else Can They Do?

I spent the rest of the match talking to my concierge (his name was James) about what's actually possible.

Here's what James told me they've done for clients:

- **Arranged a marriage proposal on the pitch** during warmups (cost: $5K extra)
- **Flown in a specific chef from Tokyo** to cook a private dinner after a match
- **Booked a helicopter to circle the stadium** during a match for a client who was claustrophobic in crowds
- **Found a karaoke bar** in a host city at 2 AM for a client's birthday
- **Organized a meet-and-greet with a former World Cup winner** within 24 hours

Nothing is too ridiculous. The concierge team has a network of fixers in every host city.

## The Truth About Concierge Services

Most people think a concierge just books your flights and hands you a ticket. That's a travel agent.

A real concierge service — the kind included with Vantage 26 packages — handles the unpredictable. The stuff you can't Google.

Lost luggage? They handle it. Flight delayed? They rebook everything. Want something weird at your seat by halftime? They find it.

**The test told me everything I needed to know.** This isn't a call center with a nice logo. It's a team of people who treat "no" as a challenge.

## Want to Test Them Yourself?

If you book a hospitality package, email the concierge before your match with something you want. Anything. See what happens.

[Book a package and test the concierge] — I dare you.

*I still have the empty bottle on my desk. Best $1,200 I've ever spent on a wine I shared with nobody.*
